Constant
4 C 4 1111111111 a mismatch

Unary 7
4 I 7 1001011001 5 mismatch

4 I 0 0000011000 2 mismatch
4 I 0n 1111100111 8 mismatch

4 AND 70 0000011000 2 mismatch
4 AND 70n 1111100111 8 mismatch
4 OR 70 1001011001 5 mismatch
4 OR 70n 0110100110 5 mismatch
4 XOR 70 1001000001 3 match 1/1

4 1001000001 3
Starting at I 6 increasing
I 7 1001011001 partial 1111100111 8
left 8
Starting at I 1 decreasing

right 5

4 I 7

Selected
0 I 3
1 I 4
2 I 5
3 I 6
4 XOR 70
5 I 1
6 I 2
7 I 3

Applying to 10110010
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 0
Output
0 I 3 = 1
1 I 4 = 0
2 I 5 = 0
3 I 6 = 1
4 XOR 70 = XOR(I 7,I 0) = XOR(0,1) = 1
5 I 1 = 0
6 I 2 = 1
7 I 3 = 1

\boxed{10011011}
